name: @intentsolutionsio/general-legal-assistant
description: AI-powered contract review, risk analysis, document generation, and compliance auditing with 12 skills and 5 parallel agents

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install general-legal-assistant\\n  or /plugin install general-legal-assistant@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
